Beneath every leaf, inside every breath, on the surface of your skin —
            trillions of organisms build worlds invisible to the naked eye.
            MicroCosmos is your microscope into that hidden frontier. The universe that fits on a single drop of water.

about-microscope-9c4d3a.query:
The microcosmos is the realm of organisms so small that a thousand
              could rest comfortably on the period at the end of this sentence.
              They were the first inhabitants of Earth, and they remain its most
              numerous, diverse, and consequential residents. An entire civilisation lives in a teaspoon of pond water.
